name: chronicle
description: Capture AI coding sessions and render private, team, and public Chronicle views.

interface.shortDescription: Turn AI coding sessions into Chronicle views.
interface.longDescription: Chronicle captures session summaries through lifecycle hooks and renders a self-contained personal devlog, project-brain HTML page, team report, public build log, and root project index from a local item store.
defaultPrompt: Use Chronicle to render my project brain.
Use Chronicle to render my team report.
Use Chronicle to draft my public build log.
Use Chronicle to capture this session into the devlog.
